animation.update_left: {{midVal}} < {{target}} (Too small), target is in the right half. Update Left = {{mid}} + 1
animation.update_right: {{midVal}} > {{target}} (Too large), target is in the left half. Update Right = {{mid}} - 1
animation.not_found: Search complete: Range is empty (Left > Right), target {{target}} not found

relatedProblems.704: Classic algorithm: search for a target value in a sorted array (basic binary search)
relatedProblems.35: Variant: find the target or return where it would be inserted (lower bound concept)
relatedProblems.34: Advanced: find the first and last position of a target in a sorted array with duplicates
